mapper.select: /* ExhibitionMapper.countShopVisibleExhibitionList: 쇼핑몰 기획전 목록 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM EXHIBITION_BASE EB WHERE EB.DEL_YN = 'N' AND EB.VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND EB.LIST_VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND EB.EXHIBITION_STAT_CD = 'EXHIBITION_STAT_02' AND NOW() >= EB.DISP_START_DT AND NOW() <= EB.DISP_END_DT

/* ExhibitionMapper.getShopVisibleExhibitionList: 쇼핑몰 기획전 목록 페이징 조회 */ SELECT EB.EXHIBITION_NO , EB.EXHIBITION_NM , EB.THUMBNAIL_URL , DATE_FORMAT(EB.DISP_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS DISP_START_DT FROM EXHIBITION_BASE EB WHERE EB.DEL_YN = 'N' AND EB.VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND EB.LIST_VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND EB.EXHIBITION_STAT_CD = 'EXHIBITION_STAT_02' AND NOW() >= EB.DISP_START_DT AND NOW() <= EB.DISP_END_DT ORDER BY EB.DISP_START_DT DESC, EB.EXHIBITION_NO DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

/* ExhibitionMapper.getShopVisibleExhibitionDetail: 쇼핑몰 노출 가능한 기획전 상세 조회 */ SELECT EB.EXHIBITION_NO , EB.EXHIBITION_NM , DATE_FORMAT(EB.DISP_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS DISP_START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(EB.DISP_END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS DISP_END_DT , EB.EXHIBITION_PC_DESC AS PC_HTML , EB.EXHIBITION_MO_DESC AS MOBILE_HTML FROM EXHIBITION_BASE EB WHERE EB.EXHIBITION_NO = #{exhibitionNo} AND EB.DEL_YN = 'N' AND EB.VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND EB.EXHIBITION_STAT_CD = 'EXHIBITION_STAT_02' AND NOW() BETWEEN EB.DISP_START_DT AND EB.DISP_END_DT

/* ExhibitionMapper.getShopVisibleExhibitionTabList: 쇼핑몰 노출 가능한 기획전 탭 목록 조회 */ SELECT ET.EXHIBITION_TAB_NO , ET.EXHIBITION_TAB_NM , DATE_FORMAT(ET.DISP_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS DISP_START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(ET.DISP_END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS DISP_END_DT FROM EXHIBITION_TAB ET WHERE ET.EXHIBITION_NO = #{exhibitionNo} AND ET.DEL_YN = 'N' AND ET.VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN ET.DISP_START_DT AND ET.DISP_END_DT AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM EXHIBITION_TAB_GOODS ETG JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = ETG.GOODS_ID AND GB.SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND GB.GOODS_STAT_CD = 'GOODS_STAT_02' WHERE ETG.EXHIBITION_TAB_NO = ET.EXHIBITION_TAB_NO AND ETG.VIEW_YN = 'Y' ) ORDER BY ET.EXHIBITION_TAB_NO ASC

/* ExhibitionMapper.countShopVisibleExhibitionGoods: 쇼핑몰 노출 가능한 기획전 탭 상품 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM EXHIBITION_TAB_GOODS ETG JOIN EXHIBITION_TAB ET ON ET.EXHIBITION_TAB_NO = ETG.EXHIBITION_TAB_NO AND ET.EXHIBITION_NO = #{exhibitionNo} AND ET.DEL_YN = 'N' AND ET.VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN ET.DISP_START_DT AND ET.DISP_END_DT JOIN EXHIBITION_BASE EB ON EB.EXHIBITION_NO = ET.EXHIBITION_NO AND EB.DEL_YN = 'N' AND EB.VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND EB.EXHIBITION_STAT_CD = 'EXHIBITION_STAT_02' AND NOW() BETWEEN EB.DISP_START_DT AND EB.DISP_END_DT JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = ETG.GOODS_ID AND GB.SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND GB.GOODS_STAT_CD = 'GOODS_STAT_02' WHERE ETG.EXHIBITION_TAB_NO = #{exhibitionTabNo} AND ETG.VIEW_YN = 'Y'

/* ExhibitionMapper.getShopVisibleExhibitionGoodsList: 쇼핑몰 노출 가능한 기획전 탭 상품 목록 페이징 조회 */ SELECT ET.EXHIBITION_NO , ETG.EXHIBITION_TAB_NO , ETG.GOODS_ID , GB.GOODS_NM , BB.BRAND_NM , GB.SUPPLY_AMT , GB.SALE_AMT , ( SELECT GI.IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG GI WHERE GI.GOODS_ID = ETG.GOODS_ID ORDER BY GI.DISP_ORD ASC, GI.IMG_NO ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS IMG_PATH , ( SELECT GI.IMG_PATH FROM GOODS_IMG GI WHERE GI.GOODS_ID = ETG.GOODS_ID ORDER BY GI.DISP_ORD ASC, GI.IMG_NO ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1 ) AS SECONDARY_IMG_PATH , ETG.SORT_SEQ FROM EXHIBITION_TAB_GOODS ETG JOIN EXHIBITION_TAB ET ON ET.EXHIBITION_TAB_NO = ETG.EXHIBITION_TAB_NO AND ET.EXHIBITION_NO = #{exhibitionNo} AND ET.DEL_YN = 'N' AND ET.VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND NOW() BETWEEN ET.DISP_START_DT AND ET.DISP_END_DT JOIN EXHIBITION_BASE EB ON EB.EXHIBITION_NO = ET.EXHIBITION_NO AND EB.DEL_YN = 'N' AND EB.VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND EB.EXHIBITION_STAT_CD = 'EXHIBITION_STAT_02' AND NOW() BETWEEN EB.DISP_START_DT AND EB.DISP_END_DT JOIN GOODS_BASE GB ON GB.GOODS_ID = ETG.GOODS_ID AND GB.SHOW_YN = 'Y' AND GB.GOODS_STAT_CD = 'GOODS_STAT_02' LEFT JOIN BRAND_BASE BB ON BB.BRAND_NO = GB.BRAND_NO WHERE ETG.EXHIBITION_TAB_NO = #{exhibitionTabNo} AND ETG.VIEW_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY ETG.SORT_SEQ ASC, ETG.GOODS_ID ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

/* ExhibitionMapper.getAdminExhibitionDetail: 기획전 상세 조회 */ SELECT EB.EXHIBITION_NO , EB.EXHIBITION_NM , DATE_FORMAT(EB.DISP_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS DISP_START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(EB.DISP_END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS DISP_END_DT , EB.LIST_VIEW_YN AS LIST_SHOW_YN , EB.VIEW_YN , EB.THUMBNAIL_URL , EB.EXHIBITION_PC_DESC , EB.EXHIBITION_MO_DESC FROM EXHIBITION_BASE EB WHERE EB.EXHIBITION_NO = #{exhibitionNo} AND EB.DEL_YN = 'N'

/* ExhibitionMapper.getExhibitionTabList: 기획전 탭 목록 조회 */ SELECT EXHIBITION_TAB_NO , EXHIBITION_NO , EXHIBITION_TAB_NM AS TAB_NM , DATE_FORMAT(DISP_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS DISP_START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(DISP_END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS DISP_END_DT , EXHIBITION_TAB_NO AS DISP_ORD , VIEW_YN AS SHOW_YN , DEL_YN , REG_NO , DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT , UDT_NO , DATE_FORMAT(UDT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UDT_DT FROM EXHIBITION_TAB WHERE EXHIBITION_NO = #{exhibitionNo} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, EXHIBITION_TAB_NO ASC
